title: The Wood Armor
description: This data pack will add 15 new armor sets made from all types of wood to your game! In addition to their collectible value, some sets have unique abilities that can enhance your gameplay!
body:
**This Data Pack adds **15 new armor sets** from all the existing trees in the game!**

---

There are several additional sets indirectly related to the tree among them. But why not add them too!

By using this Data Pack, you can set yourself a new goal! In the form of collecting each new armor set!

## **But that’s not all!** 
Some types of armor have unique abilities! 
Such as:
- Movement speed
- Reduced gravity
- Increase and decrease player size

**And so on!**

You can also decorate all sets (_except for some hats_) with patterns that you have collected!

But if you don't want your armor to have unique effects,
You can download the **cropped** version of the datapack
And just focus on collecting and aesthetically enjoying your successes in gathering all the armor sets!

(_**Important!!! It is not recommended to install the cropped and regular versions together, to avoid conflicts.**_)

### Installation instructions:
1. Download the Data Pack (**DP**) and Resource Pack (**RP**)
2. Unzip the file
3. Move the folder with the Data Pack (**DP**) to the **datapacks** folder in your world folder
4. Move the folder with the Resource Pack (**RP**) to the **resourcepacks** folder
5. Enjoy the game!
